name: Mi Yue

skills.name: Eternal Youth
skills.description: Summons a shadow servant that damages enemies and restores Health to her whenever using a skill. She also gains Shadow Power that boosts her Movement Speed and healing effects.

skills.name: Dark Transfer
skills.description: Unleashes shadow energy, dealing damage to enemies that come into contact with it. Upon using the skill again, will shift to the shadow's location, dealing damage again. A shadow servant will be summoned if she hits an enemy after shifting.

skills.name: Ravenous Tether
skills.description: Releases a tether that links to the first enemy hit. Damages and slows over time. Steals Physical and Magical Attack while recovering Health.

skills.name: Umbral Moon
skills.description: Removes debuffs, gains Movement Speed, and becomes untargetable. Deals damage to nearby enemies upon entering and exiting the untargetable state.

tips: Mi Yue (Mage): Tier A on international ranked — 49.51% WR.
Build core: Guerrilla Machete, Boots of Dexterity, Golden Blade.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 49.51%, pick 0.72%, ban 0.74%, popularity tier A.
Counters Mai Shiranui, Wukong · Weak into Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei.

faqs.question: Is Mi Yue good in current season?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is Tier A Mage with 49.51% win rate, 0.72% pick rate, and 0.74% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Mi Yue build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Guerrilla Machete, Boots of Dexterity, Golden Blade, Shadow Ripper, Blood Clan's Grimoire, Insatiable Tome. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Mi Yue?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Mi Yue: Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei. Mi Yue is strong into Mai Shiranui, Wukong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Countered by: Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei.
